name: InstructPix2Pix Edit
description: Instruction-based image editing with automatic region masking. Upload an image and type what to change (e.g. 'make the pants green'). GroundingDINO + SAM auto-detect the region, then InstructPix2Pix edits only that area — everything else stays pixel-identical. Toggle auto-mask off for global edits.
author: iammojogo

params_schema.label: Edit Instruction
params_schema.tooltip: Describe the edit (e.g. 'make the pants green', 'turn the shirt into blue')

params_schema.label: Auto-Mask Region
params_schema.tooltip: ONLY edit the detected object (OFF = global edit, old behavior)

params_schema.label: Guidance Scale
params_schema.tooltip: How strongly to follow the instruction

params_schema.label: Image Guidance
params_schema.tooltip: Lower = more creative edits (auto-mask hides global tint)
